programme.title: Lessons From The Bible
programme.desc: Join Pastor Doug, Dusty, Amelia and all the characters as they learn about the Bible and how it applies to daily life. Games, songs, and some silly puppets will inspire kids.

programme.title: Hillsong Kids: Cubbyhouse
programme.desc: An entertaining show for the little ones aged between 2 and 6, with songs, fun craft time, bible stories and animated teaching and illustrations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.sub-title: Themes and Threads of The Bible
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares the main ingredient you need to live a life that puts a smile on God's face and opens you up to a channel of His blessings.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If you want to thrive, you don't get it by hiding in the shadows, you have to step and give and God will give it back to you in abundance.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Want to be able to live beyond your feelings and experience more joy in life? Learn how the Holy Spirit can help you!

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Walking In Faith/The Companion of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships.

programme.title: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Grieving over the untimely loss of his family and in a dissociative state, an aimlessly-wandering Jewish man is rescued by another family who help him find his way back to happiness again.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.sub-title: Say Goodbye to the Grand Duchess of Greed Part 2
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame...Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Blended and step families make up around 1 in 10 families. They face unique challenges that often lead to conflict. So for Steven, entering a relationship with Rachel and her three children required a little patience.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Everyone likes to jam out to our favorite song on the radio. Thanks to Samuel Morse and Reginald Fessenden's efforts, this became a possibility. In this episode discover the evolution of mass communications.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.sub-title: The Book Closes on the New Testament Period
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts, he travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places, and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: The Unseen Realm
programme.desc: Corbin Bernsen hosts this fascinating look at the unseen realm of the Bible and casts a light on the strange and enigmatic plane of the supernatural that lies within the pages of Scripture.

programme.title: Jesus the Game Changer
programme.desc: Jesus taught that each individual had inherent value - they were loved by God, & worthy of love and attention from other people. Jesus viewed people as not only members of families or communities but as being individuals of worth.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Angkor Wat - A Message in Stone
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 2 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Want to be able to live beyond your feelings and experience more joy in life? Learn how the Holy Spirit can help you!

programme.title: 90 Minutes In Heaven
programme.desc: A man involved in a horrific car crash is pronounced dead, only to come back to life an hour and a half later, claiming to have seen Heaven.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.sub-title: Leading to Success in a Changing World
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Walking In Faith/The Companion of Faith
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: David Pawson
programme.desc: Why was the Bible written? UK theologian, Cambridge scholar, pastor and Bible teacher, David Pawson explores scripture and discovers some hidden gems.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Legacy
programme.desc: This is the third instalment of the enchanting trilogy about three college friends - Tracy, Avery and Emma - who share a 19th century wedding veil said to bring whoever possesses it true love.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 2 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Whirl
programme.desc: A cartoon series about the loveable, enthusiastic kids of First Second Church. In each episode, the kids tackle a different theme that is central to Christian values. Everything from generosity and forgiveness to doubt.

programme.title: One Night Stand Murder
programme.desc: Alyssa wakes up in a home that's not hers and discovers a dead body. With no memory of how she got there and no idea of who the body belongs to, Alyssa tries to piece together what happened.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Hider in My House
programme.desc: As Molly Bachman settles into the apartment of her dreams, she discovers a hidden entrance to another apartment within the walls.

programme.title: Road Trip Hostage
programme.desc: A deranged criminal forces a young woman to drive him across the country.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Ruby
programme.desc: In the heart of the bayou, Ruby Landry lives a simple, happy life. The only family Ruby has ever known are her loving guardian, Grandmere Catherine, and her drunken Grandpere Jack.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Expecting Amish
programme.desc: When an eventful Rumspringa leads to an unintended pregnancy, Amish teen Hannah must choose between returning to faith and family or beginning a new life elsewhere.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: A woman stumbles into the middle of a kidnapping while stranded at a small-town airport on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange as his fascination with her turns into obsession.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Cari Farver
programme.desc: Based on actual events. When his girlfriend, Cari, starts sending him demanding messages Dave decides to break it off. Shortly after, Cari disappears and the police make a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Husband, Wife and Their Lover
programme.desc: A sexually charged thriller about Franklin and Bridget, a married couple in trouble.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: From Straight A's to XXX
programme.desc: Miriam Weeks, a freshman at Duke University, is looking to make money to cover tuition and becomes infamously known for starring in online pornography under the pseudonym Belle Knox.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: You need two points of reference to make a destination. One is where we've come from and the other being how God's Grace has carried us thus far.

programme.title: David Jeremiah

programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Hour of Power

programme.title: The Divine Adventure

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Do you ever feel guilty, even after asking God for forgiveness? Today, discover how God's love and mercy sets you free from guilt and condemnation once and for all.

programme.title: Asbury Revival: Desperate for More

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: You need two points of reference to make a destination. One is where we've come from and the other being how God's Grace has carried us thus far.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part one of Aiming to Please God, Pastor Bayless shares the main ingredient you need to live a life that puts a smile on God's face and opens you up to a channel of His blessings.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 3 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Sheerluck Holmes and the Golden Ruler
programme.desc: Plenty of fun, adventures and silly songs with Bob the Tomato, Larry the Cucumber and all the Veggie Tales gang. Join them as they share stories from the Bible and learn about God who loves them.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Fallen Hearts
programme.desc: As her childhood sweetheart's bride, Heaven would savour now the love she had sought for so long. Free from her father's clutches, she would live again in her backwoods town.

programme.title: Nightmare School Moms
programme.desc: Two mothers battle to see which of their overachieving daughters will be accepted to a prestigious university. However, when one of their methods quickly spirals out of control, the games turn deadly.

programme.title: No One Would Tell
programme.desc: Laura is happy for her daughter Sarah when she begins to date the popular boy from school, Rob. It is only a matter of time before Rob begins to reveal his darker, more possessive side.

programme.title: A Roommate to Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty break-up, Faith needs a new roommate to supplement the rent and finds that something very strange is going on with the tenant who decides to move in.

programme.title: My Landlord Wants Me Dead
programme.desc: A college dropout unwittingly puts her own life at stake when she investigates a series of strange and terrifying events at her aunt's secluded ranch house.

programme.title: Abducted at an HBCU
programme.desc: College counsellor Ellen becomes concerned when Shannon, a student who's struggling financially, suddenly stops going to classes.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: Who Is Killing The Cheerleaders?
programme.desc: Ellie, a former cheerleader, returns to her high school as a teacher 10 years after she was nearly killed in a series of brutal slayings on the squad.

programme.title: Smart Home Killer
programme.desc: After surviving an attack, a mother moves with her daughter into a smart house. As strange glitches and events occur, she realises she's not the only one in control.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: A friend encourages Monica to start a crowdsource fund to pay for her daughter's hospital bills. However, when a seemingly generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: If There Be Thorns
programme.desc: With Christopher and Cathy Dollanganger living together as man and wife, Cathy's two sons are unaware of the incestuous nature of their parents' relationship.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Menendez: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: Erik and Lyle Menendez were educated, nice boys from sunny Beverly Hills, California. So when their parents were found shot dead in their home, no one could figure out why they did it.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Web of Dreams
programme.desc: Heaven's mother Leigh had to escape from Farthinggale Manor and the secrets she harboured. Falling into the arms of Luke Casteel Sr, his devotion promised her hope as only Luke knew her secrets.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: The Secret History of the Civil War
programme.desc: The American Civil War is one of the most studied and dissected events in history, but what you don't know may surprise you. From medical inventions to military espionage, the bloody conflict continues to shape our world.

programme.title: Time Team
programme.desc: Sir Tony Robinson and the team head to the village of Caerwent, one of the best-preserved Roman sites in Wales. The archaeologists excavate a prime location that has previously been untouched.

programme.title: History's Raiders
programme.desc: On December 12, 1942, an explosion rips through the hull of a German freighter in the French port of Bordeaux, destroying four blockade runners, German ships that feed the Nazi war machine.

programme.title: The War Files
programme.desc: A side of Hitler that only his inner circle saw is revealed using the home movies that he shot with his mistress Eva Braun at The Berghof, Hitler's mountain retreat.

programme.title: Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: In 2000, boxes containing top-secret files were found in a garden shed in Cornwall. They detailed the lives and codenames of Britain's first female agents sent to the frontline during the war.

programme.title: Digging For Britain
programme.desc: Archaeology in the south of England unearths Britain's oldest shoe, the lost shipyard of one of England's greatest warrior kings, and Britain's top-secret WWII defences.

programme.title: Battle 360
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise, aka the Grey Ghost, returns to the carrier-war in the Pacific with new technology. In the bloody Gilberts Invasion, she will launch the first night air operations ever flown from a carrier.

programme.title: Tanks
programme.desc: The fast moving Panzer Grenadier formations of the Blitzkrieg needed a mobile, well-armoured artillery presence to support their lightning thrusts into Poland, France and Russia.

programme.title: History's Raiders
programme.desc: Details the astonishing concept behind the bouncing bomb and re-creates the raids on each dam, using archive footage to relive the incredible feats of flying and marksmanship of the Dambusters.

programme.title: The War Files

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Sheerluck Holmes and the Golden Ruler

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: A seven-week series looking at the discipleship lessons that are found in Jesus' letters to the seven churches from the book of Revelation.

programme.title: Soul Sessions
programme.desc: An exploration into the New Zealand gospel music scene with a focus on Pacific musicians and artists. The award-winning artists are a mix of new and established faces, who share the vision of expressing faith through music.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Jeni: Hometown Harvest
programme.desc: This time it's Jeni's turn to show off her culinary skills in her new series Hometown Harvest. Jeni and her friends & family are cooking up some of her favourite foods. Come along as Jeni welcomes you into the family.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Shares the real stories of those who have journeyed through bondage to freedom and can now inspire others. Topics are discussed with host Jo Bouris, Clinical Psychologist, Sarah Harriott and guests.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: Drive Thru History
programme.desc: Dave Stotts explores the amazing lives of the very first Christians. Using the Book of Acts as a roadmap, Dave travels the Mediterranean region to share the people, places and events that launched the faith.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Parables of Jesus: The Talents - Part 1
programme.desc: What sets God's people apart from the world? Today, Joyce shares more enlightening truths from the Book of Matthew, chapter 25.

programme.title: Convocation
programme.desc: Weekly Liberty University Campus Convocation services connect students with their Creator through passionate worship and powerful messages firmly rooted in Biblical truth.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Rosemary and Lee's daughter has brought up memories of Rosemary's own mother and questions about her past. Meanwhile, the kids feel left out of the hot springs with all the tourists.

programme.title: View & Chew
programme.desc: The Empire State strikes back with an all out pizza vs pizza extravaganza. From old classics to wild combinations, Allie & Kels try all the pizza NYC has to offer.

programme.title: Live + Local
programme.desc: A work-place comedy about 'TnT In The Morning,' a Christian morning radio show team on KHUGG-FM. The fake show plays out in real-time with real celebrity guests and hilarious behind the scenes drama.

programme.title: Dot Conner: Webtective
programme.desc: Follows an inquisitive young teenager as she investigates questions about faith as if she is a detective solving a mystery. Dot's cases unfold through the lens of social media and technology.

programme.title: Little Worship Company
programme.desc: Hal, Mr and Mrs Looyah present this Bible- and worship-based series. For children up to 7 years old, LIGHT AND SEA explores the wonderful world around us - and the awesome God who made it.

programme.title: Owlegories
programme.desc: Owlegories is an animated series that follows a group of student owls as they travel on adventures learning about nature, faith, and God!

programme.title: Superbook
programme.desc: Superbook teaches children timeless moral truths and life lessons through the captivating, Bible-based adventures of two time-traveling children and their robot friend.

programme.title: Friends and Heroes
programme.desc: Mackie Discovers his boss is an undercover hero freeing friends of Jesus from the Roman guards. What happens when Mackie wants to get in on the action?

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: Living The Dream
programme.desc: In the episode, Tori and Jason, renovate Southern Comfort from a junky old house that is falling apart to a spacious, elegant and comfortable design.

programme.title: TV4DADS: Australian Adventure
programme.desc: TV4Dads host, Brian Molitor explores the beautiful country of Australia, meets with some incredible people, and finds adventure along the way.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show with a difference that celebrates the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics including dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality.

programme.title: Live + Local
programme.sub-title: There's a New PD in Town
programme.desc: A work-place comedy about 'TnT In The Morning,' a Christian morning radio show team on KHUGG-FM. The fake show plays out in real-time with real celebrity guests and hilarious behind the scenes drama.

programme.title: The Committee
programme.desc: Park Grove Community Church has lost its pastor and is closing its doors unless it reinvents itself. With the help of Chuck, a compassionate visionary whose ideas get the church into perplexing predicaments.

programme.title: A Cathedral Pilgrimage
programme.desc: A Pilgrimage through Britain's Great Cathedrals explores cathedrals & abbeys found throughout England & Wales, featuring interviews with historians & experts & breathtaking footage.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 4 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: A Moment in History
programme.desc: Join host Seth Udinski as he explores the most pivotal moments in history and the Bible, providing insight into the events that have shaped our world.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: If you want to thrive, you don't get it by hiding in the shadows, you have to step and give and God will give it back to you in abundance.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: The Parables of Jesus: The Talents - Part 1
programme.desc: What sets God's people apart from the world? Today, Joyce shares more enlightening truths from the Book of Matthew, chapter 25.

programme.title: The Hiding Place
programme.desc: WWII. Darkness has fallen over Europe. On a quiet city corner in the Netherlands, Corrie Ten Boom and her family risk everything to hide Jewish refugees by the hundreds.

programme.title: God's Grace: The Sheila Johnson Story
programme.desc: Based on the life of Sheila Johnson who was diagnosed with stage IV metastatic breast cancer and later found an advocacy group to support Black women and men diagnosed with the disease.

programme.title: John Wycliffe: The Morning Star
programme.desc: A docu-drama biography of the life of the 14th century scholar and cleric who translated the Bible into English for the first time. John Wycliffe was a champion of the poor against the injustices of the rich.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Judah - David's Training Ground of Faith
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life Pt 4 of 5
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: God Rocks! Playlist
programme.desc: Join kid-hosts Myles and Stella for a fun, non-stop musical playlist of hit songs about Faith and Trust!

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Surviving The Sleepover
programme.desc: Outspoken teenager Hannah goes to a sleepover at a popular girl's house, not realising she was only invited to be the victim of a prank.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: An Amish Murder
programme.desc: A woman returns to the Amish farming community of her youth, but her peace is shattered when a murder investigation exposes a dark secret that could destroy her.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: V.C Andrews' Pearl In The Mist
programme.desc: Fate whisked Ruby from a simple life in the Louisiana bayou. But her new riches bring more treachery than happiness.

programme.title: The Killer Is Calling
programme.desc: When a mysterious killer targets a remote island town, a veteran 911 operator tries to uncover his motives and save her community, one emergency call at a time.

programme.title: Love Triangle Nightmare
programme.desc: Brittany meets a stranger who has everything she wants in a partner and despite being an unknown man as warned by others, she falls in love with him which leads to something tragic.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: A Daughter's Nightmare
programme.desc: Soon after her father's death, college freshman Ariel learns her mother, Dana, has met Adam, a seemingly well-meaning and charming man at a grief support group.

programme.title: Big Driver
programme.desc: A mystery writer stranded on a stretch of New England road is offered assistance by another driver. She quickly discovers her saviour is actually her assailant - and a killer.

programme.title: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, Colleen Stan doesn't think twice when she hitchhikes and is picked up by young couple Cameron and Janice Hooker. But the life she knows is ripped away when they abduct her.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Gates Of Paradise
programme.desc: The car crash that killed Heaven and Logan left Annie Casteel Stonewall orphaned and crippled. Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by the possessive Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: While on a road trip through the desert, Charlie and her boyfriend Aidan break down in the middle of nowhere.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: A Deadly Threat to My Family
programme.desc: Marielle becomes suspicious when her sister-in-law escapes from a cult and seeks refuge at her home. When another cult member shows up on her doorstep, she fears her daughter is their next target.

programme.title: Big Lies in a Small Town
programme.desc: A young mother frantically searches for her teen daughter after their car crashes outside of a small town in the middle of nowhere and her daughter goes missing.

programme.title: Living With My Mother's Killer
programme.desc: Still reeling from the tragic murder of her mother years ago, Mara forgives the murderer, and allows him to work on her property, only to find that the past is not always past.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge

programme.desc: Driven from the Dumas mansion back to her beloved bayou, Ruby is determined to make a secure and happy home for her precious infant daughter, Pearl.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger

programme.title: I Was Lorena Bobbitt
programme.desc: The story of a severely abused young woman whose torment, both physical and mental, at the hands of her husband pushed her over the edge.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a wealthy jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns the dark truth about him.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club

programme.title: View & Chew

programme.sub-title: Stay On Grace Ground And Experience True Life
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Kindness Diaries
programme.desc: Adventurer Leon Logothetis hops on a vintage motorbike for a 25,000-mile trip around the world with no money, food, petrol or place to stay. He puts his fate in the hands of strangers.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: As a teen, Karli felt she could never live up to the expectations she thought others had of her. Seeking approval, or attention from other people to fit in, came at the expense of developing a true sense of self.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mystery
programme.desc: A librarian with a sharp mind for murder, Aurora Teagarden is known around her small town as a master sleuth. When her friend Jane unexpectedly dies, she also leaves a troubling murder mystery haunting her neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil
programme.desc: First instalment of a trilogy in which longtime college friends Avery, Emma and Tracy buy an antique lace wedding veil said to bring true love to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.desc: The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: The Girl Who Believes in Miracles
programme.desc: When young Sara hears a preacher say faith can move mountains, she starts praying. Suddenly, people in her town are mysteriously healed - but fame soon takes its toll.

programme.title: The Good Road
programme.desc: Through Puerto Rico's ecosystems we see the balance between conservation & community.

programme.title: Celtic Rhythms
programme.desc: Take a journey through Ireland, Scotland, England, & Wales for an adventure in prayer & faith. Travel deep into the heart of Celtic lands; be inspired by the early Celtic Christians to build a rhythm of prayer.

programme.title: I Am Second
programme.desc: White supremacist Michael Kent, and his black parole officer Tiffany Whittier remember their past. Renowned Christian singer Michael W. Smith recalls the moment his life changed and the path that followed.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: When we see God's holiness, it makes us long for the day when we will be like Him. Until then, we strive to cultivate holiness in our lives.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.sub-title: Abundant Life, Embrace the New and the Next
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Apple of My Eye
programme.desc: A young girl struggles after a traumatic horse riding accident causes her to lose her eyesight. Charles, the head trainer of Southeastern Guide Dogs, trains Apple, a miniature horse, to be her companion and surrogate eyes.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.sub-title: Getting a Piece of the Rock
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Royal Ashes
programme.desc: Nineteen year old Paul Royal is trapped in a life he didn't ask for. When his mother falls to addiction, he must choose between pursuing his own dreams and keeping his abandoned siblings together.

programme.title: Travis: A Soldier's Story
programme.desc: On April 10, 2012, life for the Mills family dramatically changed forever. A routine patrol in Afghanistan turned into the fight of SSG Travis Mills's life when he was hit by an IED and lost portions of both arms and legs.

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is real, life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible and their aim is to express the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: You need two points of reference to make a destination. One is where we've come from and the other being how God's Grace has carried us thus far.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Because God is all-powerful, we can depend on His presence and power to work on our behalf. Nothing is impossible for Him.

programme.title: Love at First Lie
programme.desc: Kate is looking for the perfect match online when she swipes and meets Walker, a wealthy jet-setting art dealer. After Kate falls for the dashing dealer, she learns the dark truth about him.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Gates Of Paradise
programme.desc: The car crash that killed Heaven and Logan left Annie Casteel Stonewall orphaned and crippled. Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by the possessive Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family.

programme.title: Cruise Ship Murder
programme.desc: After her aunt is found dead, having mysteriously fallen overboard on a cruise ship, Olivia is thrown into rough seas as her uncle's secret past is brought to life and more deaths occur.

programme.title: The Night Stalker
